executives.name: Tufan Erginbilgic
executives.background: Tufan joined Rolls-Royce as Chief Executive Officer on 1 January 2023. He has a background in engineering and spent over 20 years at BP, including five years as a member of its executive team. His last role at BP was as CEO of Downstream. He has also held several non-executive directorships in heavy industry and manufacturing companies.

executives.name: Helen McCabe
executives.background: Helen joined Rolls-Royce as Chief Financial Officer on 1 September 2023. She was previously Senior Vice President, Finance for the Customer & Products division at BP. She has more than 25 years of experience in senior finance and leadership roles within the energy sector.

board_of_directors.name: Anita Frew
board_of_directors.background: Anita was appointed to the Board in July 2021 and became Chair in October 2021. She has extensive experience in board leadership across various sectors including chemicals, engineering, and finance. She is also the Chair of Croda International Plc.

board_of_directors.name: Tufan Erginbilgic
board_of_directors.background: Tufan joined Rolls-Royce as Chief Executive Officer on 1 January 2023. He has a background in engineering and spent over 20 years at BP, including five years as a member of its executive team.

board_of_directors.name: Helen McCabe
board_of_directors.background: Helen joined Rolls-Royce as Chief Financial Officer on 1 September 2023. She has more than 25 years of experience in senior finance and leadership roles.

board_of_directors.name: Panos Kakoullis
board_of_directors.background: Panos joined the Board in May 2021. He was previously a partner at Deloitte where he spent over 30 years, including as Managing Director of the Global Audit & Assurance business.

board_of_directors.name: Dame Angela Strank
board_of_directors.background: Angela joined the Board in May 2020. She has over 35 years of experience in the energy industry, primarily with BP, where she held various senior leadership and technology roles.

board_of_directors.name: Jørgen Madsen Lindemann
board_of_directors.background: Jørgen joined the Board in March 2022. He is the CEO of SAS AB and has extensive experience in the media and digital sectors, having previously served as President and CEO of Modern Times Group.

board_of_directors.name: Beverly Goulet
board_of_directors.background: Beverly joined the Board in July 2017. She has significant experience in the airline industry, having held senior roles at American Airlines, including Senior Vice President and Chief Integration Officer.

sources.source_description: Official Rolls-Royce website - Board of Directors page
